overview.short: Vijayamangalam Jain temple also known as Chandrapraba Tirtankarar Temple is a Jain temple in the town of Vijayamangalam in Erode district, Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Vijayamangalam Jain temple also known as Chandrapraba Tirtankarar Temple is a Jain temple in the town of Vijayamangalam in Erode district, Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kongampalayam
topPlaces.description: Kongampalayam is a small agricultural village in the Erode district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a population of 388, with most of the population having agriculture and clothing as their primary source of income.location code or village code of Kongampalayam village is 635003.

topPlaces.name: Nanjarayan Bird Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Nanjarayan Bird Sanctuary or Nanjarayan Tank Bird Sanctuary is a protected area and bird sanctuary located in Tiruppur district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is recently added as ramsar site.The sanctuary covers an area of 1.26 km2 (0.49 sq mi) and was notified in 2022.

topPlaces.name: Thudupathi
topPlaces.description: Thudupathi is a town in the taluk of Perundurai in the district of Erode in Tamil Nadu, India. The distance between Perundurai and the village is 5 kilometers and from NH47 it is 2.5 kilometers.

topPlaces.name: Perundurai
topPlaces.description: Perundurai is a municipality in Erode district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Perundurai has developed as an industrial center with SIPCOT Industrial Estate and SEZ Complex.

topPlaces.name: Nichampalayam
topPlaces.description: Nichampalayam is a panchayat village in Perundurai taluk in Erode District of Tamil Nadu state, India. It is about 25 km from Perundurai and 30 km from district headquarters Erode.

topPlaces.name: Sundakkampalayam
topPlaces.description: Sundakkampalayam is a panchayat village in Uthukuli taluk in Tiruppur District of Tamil Nadu state, India. It is about 26 km from Gobichettipalayam and 44 km from Erode.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jain temple, Mettupudur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jain temple, Mettupudur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jain temple, Mettupudur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (65 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jain temple, Mettupudur?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jain temple, Mettupudur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jain temple, Mettupudur?
faq.a: Stays in Jain temple, Mettupudur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jain temple, Mettupudur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kongampalayam, Nanjarayan Bird Sanctuary, Thudupathi, Perundurai, Nichampalayam.
